conflicts.reason: Rendering engine collision. You can only use ONE core rendering optimization mod.
Lighting engine collision. Both rewrite the light engine. Choose one.
Overlapping recipe viewers. They will overlap on screen and cause lag. Choose one.
Shader pipeline collision. Choose either Iris/Oculus OR Optifine.
Performance mod collision. BetterFPS is for legacy versions, Sodium/Rubidium are modern.
Mod loader mismatch. You cannot mix mods from different base loaders.
Physics engine collision. Both attempt to make blocks move with custom physics.
Multiple minimaps installed. This wastes resources and clutters the screen.
Performance optimization overlap. Choose compatible set.
BetterFPS distance calculation conflicts with Sodium/Lithium.
Multiple HUD mods may overlap.
WorldEdit CUI requires WorldEdit to function.
Multiple map rendering tools. Choose only one.
Both modify player skin rendering.
Both are recipe/game modification frameworks. Incompatible scripts.
Both modify combat mechanics.
Both add mob entities to the world.
Multiple recording mods. Choose only one.
OptiFine breaks Twilight Forest boss rendering and portals.
OptiFine completely breaks Create's rendering of moving contraptions.
Canvas is a renderer replacement. It is entirely incompatible with Sodium.
Networking optimization overlap. Will cause server disconnects.

known_compatibles.reason: These are standard API/library mods that are designed to work together.
These performance mods from CaffeineMC are designed to be compatible.
Sodium and Iris are explicitly compatible — Iris depends on Sodium.
Cloth Config API is a standard library used by many Fabric mods.
Architectury API is a cross-loader library that works with Fabric API.
Both are standard library APIs and are designed to be compatible.
Mod Menu is a standard Fabric mod that requires Fabric API.
Sodium Extra requires Sodium and Iris and is fully compatible.
Flywheel is a rendering library required by Create.
Both are worldgen mods from the same team and are compatible.
Decorational mods that are compatible with each other.
